---
title: "My First Python Code Post"
date: "2026-06-05"
categories: [python, learning]
---

## Running Python in Quarto

Watch how Quarto can actually run Python code and show the result!

```{python}
def calculate_squares(numbers):
    return [n**2 for n in numbers]

my_list = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
print("Original:", my_list)
print("Squares:", calculate_squares(my_list))
